parameters.content:
## Auto-Generate Service Agreement via Documentero

Trigger: Called by the onboarding workflow after a new client pays.
Flow: Receive client data → call Documentero API with template + merge fields → get PDF → upload to SuiteDash client folder.

**SETUP:**
1. Upload the PA-CROP-Service-Agreement.docx to Documentero as a template
2. Note the template ID
3. Replace DOCUMENTERO_TEMPLATE_ID below with the real ID
4. Documentero API key is already configured in n8n credential: 1iwHVJxga79OqoMk

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "document": "DOCUMENTERO_TEMPLATE_ID",
  "format": "pdf",
  "data": [
    {
      "client_name": "{{$json.body.fullName || $json.body.name || 'Client'}}",
      "entity_name": "{{$json.body.entityName || 'Entity Name'}}",
      "entity_number": "{{$json.body.entityNumber || ''}}",
      "entity_type": "{{$json.body.entityType || 'Domestic LLC'}}",
      "client_address": "{{$json.body.address || ''}}",
      "client_email": "{{$json.body.email || ''}}",
      "service_tier": "{{$json.body.tier || 'Starter'}}",
      "annual_fee": "{{$json.body.tier === 'Premium' ? '$299.00' : $json.body.tier === 'Professional' ? '$179.00' : '$79.00'}}",
      "effective_date": "{{new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', {year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric'})}}",
      "provider_name": "PA Registered Office Services, LLC",
      "provider_address": "Erie, PA",
      "provider_phone": "814-480-0989",
      "provider_email": "hello@pacropservices.com"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.subject: Your PA CROP Services Agreement — please review and sign
parameters.html:
=

Your Service Agreement

Hi {{$json.clientName}},

Your personalized service agreement for {{$json.entityName}} is ready for review.

Please download, review, and sign the attached agreement. Once signed, you can upload it through your client portal or reply to this email with the signed copy.

Download Agreement (PDF)

— PA CROP Services
hello@pacropservices.com
